name: Peanut Butter Cup Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Unwrap each Reese's peanut butter cup.
3. Follow the slicing instructions on the cookie wrapper and cut each cookie into quarters.
4. Place each quarter in a greased miniature muffin cup.
5. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the cookies puff up and are barely cooked through.
6. Remove from the oven and immediately place a Reese's peanut butter cup into each cooled cookie muffin cup.
7. The cookie will deflate slightly and form a tart shell around the peanut butter cup as the chocolate melts.
8. Allow the tarts to cool completely before refrigerating until ready to serve.
9. Gently lift each tart from the baking cup using the tip of a knife.
10. Makes 36 tarts.
